_meta.scope: Pullback entry strategies — gate, fill-improvement, and size-boost variants
_meta.ship_criteria: Δ ≥ $30 per symbol AND WF avg PF > 1.5 AND ≥ 3/5 folds positive

iterations.approach: Pullback as HARD GATE on signal (industry-standard textbook)
iterations.result: ALL variants reduced trade count by 70-99% and PnL by 95%+
iterations.insight: Current momentum strategy works by RIDING breakouts, not buying dips. Hard pullback gates remove 90%+ of edge by filtering out the breakout trades that pay the bills. The bot is NOT a pullback strategy at signal-generation level.

iterations.approach: Pullback as FILL improvement — keep signal generation, deepen the retrace target + max-wait, with fallback to direct entry
iterations.verdict: INVESTIGATE — multiple variants pass 5/5 folds positive, but UKOUSD/US2000 carry most of the gain

iterations.approach: Sensitivity sweep — finer ATR depths (0.4/0.6/0.8) and wait windows
iterations.dd_improvement: deep_08_5bar IMPROVES DD across all 8 symbols (e.g. DJ30 5.6%→3.1%, EURUSD 7.8%→4.1%, US2000 6.4%→3.8%)

iterations.approach: Stress test with REALISTIC fallback price (next_bar_open instead of stale c[i])
iterations.purpose: Verify edge isn't an artifact of look-ahead in fallback path
iterations.verdict: EDGE PERSISTS — fallback price had no material impact, mechanism is real

iterations.approach: OOS test on 10 OTHER live symbols + walk-forward across full 18-symbol portfolio

winner.mechanism: Place a limit order 0.8 ATR away from signal price; wait up to 5 H1 bars for fill; if no fill, fall back to direct entry. This already mirrors the live brain.py:1944-1967 logic; only the two parameters need tuning.
winner.fill_rate_observed_avg: 47-54% of trades fill at the deeper pullback target; rest fall back to direct entry without penalty

wf_evidence.dd_impact: DROPS across 8/8 top symbols. Notably DJ30 5.6%→3.1%, EURUSD 7.8%→4.1%, US2000 6.4%→3.8%, UKOUSD 6.4%→4.2%.

live_risk_callouts: Live spread + slippage may eat into the 0.8 ATR price improvement. Backtest used spread but no slippage; real fills may be 0.05-0.15 ATR worse than modelled.
Limit-order partial-fills + re-quote dynamics need live-monitoring on first week.
XAGUSD (silver) showed -$143 in OOS — consider opt-out for this symbol.
GBPUSD showed -$374 in OOS but +5/5 fold-wins in WF — keep monitoring; likely noise.

Most of the 8-symbol PnL gain is concentrated in UKOUSD (+$34K) and US2000 (+$13K). If those data series are particularly retrace-prone, the gain may not generalize to a different market regime. Recommend 7-day demo monitor before full deployment.

rationale: Variant deep_08_5bar passes ALL ship criteria: 8/8 top symbols Δ≥+$30, 7/10 OOS symbols Δ≥+$30, WF avg PF 4.99, 5/5 portfolio folds positive vs baseline. Lower max drawdown across all 8 top symbols is a confirmatory signal of real risk-adjusted edge (not just leveraged PnL). The mechanism (deeper limit-fill before fallback) is operationally trivial — just two config parameter changes in config.py, no code refactoring needed. Live brain.py already implements the framework; this is a TUNE, not a build.
